description: Create a content slide on external forces and emerging risks shaping CROs' strategic agenda, using a three-column horizontal bar chart layout with a bottom callout text block.

header.headline: External forces and emerging risks shaping and influencing CROs’ strategic agenda.

series.label: Technological advancements (e.g., rapid growth and responsible use of AI)
Geopolitical instability (e.g., trade tensions, political conflicts)
Talent and culture (e.g., talent gaps associated with emerging technologies)
Disintermediation (e.g., the rise of FinTech, nonbank financial institutions, peer-to-peer lending, blockchain)
Quantum computing giving rise to a more complex cybersecurity and data privacy environment
Regulatory fragmentation and localization (e.g., variability in the requirements of rules across different jurisdictions)
Regulatory implementation discrepancies (e.g., jurisdictions applying similar or uniform rules in different ways)
Severity and/or increasing frequency of large-scale climate events

main.body: Forward-looking CROs are already exploring how external forces will impact the banking business in the years ahead.
